---
name: Feature request
about: Got an idea? Let's talk about it.
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
  Before opening this, check if:
  1. There's already an open issue for this — search first.
  2. It's in the "not in scope" list in the README — some things are deliberate non-goals.
  3. It belongs in Discussions instead — if you're not sure it's a good idea yet,
     start a discussion. Feature requests should be reasonably well-formed.
-->

## What problem does this solve?

<!--
  This is the most important part. Don't start with the solution —
  start with the problem. "I want X" is less useful than "Every time I do Y,
  I have to manually Z, which is annoying because..."

  If you can't describe the problem clearly, the feature probably isn't ready to build yet.
-->

---

## Who runs into this problem?

<!-- Is this something specific to your setup, or do you think most users would hit it?
     A feature that helps 80% of users is worth more discussion than one that helps 5%. -->

---

## What would the solution look like?

<!-- Your proposed solution. Be as specific as you can — CLI changes, generated file changes,
     new template options, new architecture support, whatever it is. -->

<!-- If it touches the CLI prompt flow, describe the new questions or options you'd add. -->

<!-- If it touches a template, describe what would change in the generated output. -->

---

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other ways you could solve this. Maybe there's a simpler approach,
     or maybe you already ruled something out for a good reason. -->

---

## Anything else?

<!-- Prior art, links to similar tools that do this well,
     how much effort you think this would take, whether you'd be up for building it. -->
